title: dupatya ochrocephala
intro: Dupatya ochrocephala, a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia, is also known as the Golden Chain Tree or Golden Rain Tree. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dupatya ochrocephala include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction for its herbal uses, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
